name: Maa-amet Cadastral Data & WMS Services
operator: Maa-amet (Estonian Land and Spatial Development Board)
dataType: Cadastral parcels, parcel identifiers, addresses, restrictions, administrative boundaries
description: Full cadastral parcel dataset for Estonia with public WMS/WFS services covering parcels, restrictions, topographic data, and administrative divisions from the Land Board geoportal.

name: Estonian Geological Survey (EGT) Geodata
dataType: Bedrock geology, Quaternary deposits, hydrogeology, groundwater, mineral resources, geological archive reports
formats: Shapefile, PDF maps, web viewer, GeoJSON
description: National geological survey providing bedrock, Quaternary, hydrogeological, geophysical, and mineral resource maps plus a digital geological archive with over 8000 reports accessible via WFS.

name: PRIA Agricultural Parcels (LPIS Estonia)
operator: PRIA (Estonian Agricultural Registers and Information Board)
dataType: Agricultural parcel boundaries, eligible areas, land cover, crop declarations
description: Land Parcel Identification System for Estonia providing reference agricultural parcel boundaries, maximum eligible areas, and land cover data used for CAP area-based payments.

name: RMK State Forest Management Maps
dataType: Forest inventory, stand data, forestry works, recreational sites, nature conservation areas
description: Maps and spatial data from Estonia's State Forest Management Centre covering 1.4 million hectares (45% of all Estonian forests), including forestry works plans, recreational sites, and nature areas.

name: KESE Environmental Monitoring Database
dataType: Environmental monitoring data: air, water, soil, marine, biodiversity, radiation
description: Central environmental monitoring database consolidating data from Estonia's national environmental monitoring programme covering marine, freshwater, air quality, soil, biodiversity, and radiation monitoring.

name: EELIS Estonian Nature Information System
dataType: Protected areas, Natura 2000 habitats, species records, micro-reserves, hunting areas
description: Estonia's central nature information system containing protected areas, Natura 2000 habitats, species observations, micro-reserves, and conservation planning data with spatial data services.

name: eElurikkus (eBiodiversity) Portal
dataType: Species occurrence records, specimens, observations, sounds, images, DNA-based observations
description: Estonia's national biodiversity portal aggregating 30,000+ species records from scientific collections, monitoring, and citizen science via the PlutoF data management platform.

name: LVM GEO Geospatial Platform
operator: AS Latvijas valsts meži (Latvia's State Forests)
dataType: Forest maps, cadastral data, orthophotos, terrain models, forest roads, topographic maps
formats: Web viewer, WMS layers, mobile app
description: One of Latvia's largest geospatial data collections maintained by State Forests, integrating forest inventory maps, cadastral data, orthophotos, terrain models, and topographic maps in a public map browser.

name: DAP Nature Data Management System OZOLS
dataType: Protected areas, Natura 2000 sites, species and habitat data, micro-reserves, biodiversity monitoring
description: Latvia's backbone nature protection information system storing protected area boundaries, species and habitat records, micro-reserves, management plans, and biodiversity monitoring data across 760 specially protected areas.

name: LGIA Topographic Maps & Open Data
dataType: Topographic maps (1:2000 to 1:1M), orthophotos, geodetic reference data, administrative boundaries
formats: GeoTIFF, Shapefile, web viewer, WMS layers
description: Latvia's national mapping agency providing topographic maps at multiple scales, orthophotos, geodetic reference data, and administrative boundaries as open data with WMS services.

name: LAD Agricultural Parcels (LPIS Latvia)
dataType: Agricultural parcel boundaries, eligible areas, crop data, field register
description: Latvia's Land Parcel Identification System maintained by the Rural Support Service, providing agricultural parcel reference data, field boundaries, and eligible areas for CAP payments.

name: TAPIS Spatial Planning Information System
operator: Ministry of Environmental Protection and Regional Development
dataType: Spatial development plans, land use zoning, building regulations, municipal and national planning documents
description: Latvia's spatial development planning portal integrating data from the Building Information System, Land Cadastre, and state mapping to provide planning specialists and citizens with spatial planning documents at all levels.

name: LVGMC Marine Data Browser
operator: Latvijas Vides, geologijas un meteorologijas centrs (LVGMC)
dataType: Marine meteorology forecasts, sea surface temperature, ice cover, vessel icing risk, drift trajectories
description: Open-access marine data browser by LVGMC providing Baltic Sea meteorological forecasts, sea state data, vessel icing risk, and 2D drift trajectory calculations for Latvian waters.

name: Lithuanian Geological Survey (LGT) Data
dataType: Geological maps, hydrogeological data, mineral resources, geohazards, Quaternary deposits
description: Lithuania's national geological survey providing bedrock and Quaternary geology maps, hydrogeological data, mineral resource inventories, and geohazard assessments through INSPIRE-compliant services.

name: NZT National Land Service Geodata
dataType: Land management, soil maps, land use, geodetic reference, real estate cadastre
description: Lithuania's national land administration agency providing soil maps, land use data, cadastral surveying, geodetic reference systems, and state spatial datasets through geoportal.lt.

name: VSTT State Service for Protected Areas
dataType: Protected area boundaries, Natura 2000 sites, nature frame, biodiversity data, management plans
description: Lithuania's State Service for Protected Areas managing the State Cadastre of Protected Areas with boundaries, Natura 2000 sites, and nature frame data covering approximately 60% of the country area.

name: VMU State Forest Enterprise Data
dataType: Forest inventory, stand-level data, stock volume, species composition, forest disturbances
description: Lithuania's state forest enterprise managing 1.1 million hectares of forest with stand-wise inventory data, forestry planning, and satellite-derived forest disturbance monitoring.

name: State Cadastre of Forests of Lithuania
operator: VI Registru centras / Ministry of Environment
dataType: Forest land parcels, ownership, forest resource quantity and quality, economic value
description: Lithuania's specialised state cadastre registering over 2 million hectares of forest land and 1.9 million inventory parcels with ownership, resource quality, and economic value data, administered by Centre of Registers since 2024.

name: IMO Earthquake and Volcanic Monitoring Portal
dataType: Real-time earthquakes, volcanic tremor, GPS deformation, strain, catalogue of volcanoes
description: Real-time seismicity and volcanic monitoring portal for Iceland providing earthquake catalogues, volcanic tremor, GPS deformation data, and the Catalogue of Icelandic Volcanoes via SeisComP.

name: LMI GeoNetwork Data Catalogue
operator: Landmaelingar Islands (National Land Survey of Iceland)
dataType: DEM (10 m), orthophotos, topographic data, place names, administrative boundaries
description: Iceland's national geodata metadata catalogue and download portal providing DEMs, orthophotos, topographic datasets, and administrative boundaries from the National Land Survey.

name: Icelandic Coast Guard Hydrographic Service
dataType: Nautical charts, bathymetry, harbour plans, fishing charts, navigational data
description: Iceland's national hydrographic office producing 80 nautical charts (transit, coastal, harbour), bathymetric surveys, and electronic navigational charts for Icelandic waters since IHO membership in 1957.

name: Skipulagsstofnun National Planning Agency Geodata
dataType: Municipal master plans, local plans, land-use zoning, coastal and marine spatial plans, EIA data
description: Iceland's planning agency providing digital spatial plans, land-use zoning maps, municipal master plans, and marine spatial plans in standardised GIS format through the Deiliskipulagssja viewer.

name: MFRI Marine and Freshwater Research Data
dataType: Fish stock surveys, oceanographic measurements, plankton, freshwater ecology, marine habitat maps
description: Iceland's Marine and Freshwater Research Institute providing fish stock assessment data, oceanographic time series, plankton surveys, and freshwater ecology data from 190 staff and 2 research vessels.

name: Icelandic Nature Conservation Agency (formerly UST)
dataType: Protected areas, national parks, nature reserves, species conservation, environmental permits
description: Iceland's nature conservation authority (reorganised January 2025 from UST) managing protected area data, national parks including Vatnajokull, nature reserves, and species conservation programmes.

name: Continental Shelf Department Geological Data
operator: Continental Shelf Department (Geological Survey of Malta)
dataType: Geological maps (1:10 000), seabed mapping, bathymetry, mineral resources, coastal geology
description: Malta's geological survey providing the updated 1:10,000 geological map (2022, twice the resolution of predecessor), seabed bathymetry covering 76,000 km2 of continental shelf, and coastal geology data.

name: Malta Hydrographic Office (Transport Malta)
operator: Transport Malta - Ports and Yachting Directorate
dataType: Electronic navigational charts, hydrographic surveys, notices to mariners, navigational warnings
description: Malta's national hydrographic office producing 6 electronic navigational charts, conducting hydrographic surveys, and disseminating maritime safety information for Maltese territorial waters.

name: SCH Cultural Heritage GIS & National Inventory
dataType: Scheduled properties, cultural heritage sites, archaeological finds, national inventory entries
description: Malta's cultural heritage GIS interface providing public access to the National Inventory of scheduled and protected cultural heritage properties under the Cultural Heritage Act (CAP 445).

name: NSO Malta Census & Spatial Statistics
dataType: Census data on 1 km2 grid, enumeration area boundaries, population density, housing statistics
description: Malta's National Statistics Office providing census population and housing data on spatial divisions including 986 enumeration areas and 1 km2 Eurostat reference grids for thematic mapping.

name: EWA Groundwater Monitoring Network
dataType: Groundwater levels, abstraction data, aquifer monitoring, water quality, unsaturated zone measurements
description: Malta's groundwater monitoring programme tracking water levels, abstraction volumes from metered boreholes, contaminant concentrations, and aquifer characteristics across the Mean Sea Level and Perched aquifer systems.

name: Planning Authority MapServer
dataType: Development permits, zoning maps, local plans, enforcement data, scheduled properties, building footprints
description: Malta's Planning Authority GIS platform providing public access to development permits, zoning, local plans, enforcement cases, and scheduled property data through an ESRI-powered map interface.
